---
title: "DigComp 2.2"
subtitle: "European Digital Competence Framework for Citizens"
jurisdiction: "EU"
framework-type: "Pedagogy"
organizing-units: 5
elements: 21
license: "EU re-use terms"
date: 2026-05-08
categories: [pedagogy, eu]
---

## At a glance

| | |
|---|---|
| Steward | Joint Research Centre, European Commission |
| Canonical page | [DigComp at the Joint Research Centre](https://joint-research-centre.ec.europa.eu/digcomp_en) |
| Version | 2.2 |
| Released | 2022-03-17 |
| Authors | Vuorikari, Kluzer, and Punie |
| Source format | PDF (JRC publication JRC128415) |
| License | Subject to European Commission re-use terms |
| `framework_summary` slug | `digcomp-2.2` |

## Structure in cybed: terms

::: {.column-page}

```{=html}
<figure class="schema-diagram">
<button type="button" class="toggle-all" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Toggle schema names for all elements"><span class="toggle-icon" aria-hidden="true">▸</span><span class="toggle-text">schema names</span></button>
<svg viewBox="0 0 460 400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-labelledby="digcomp-structure-title">
  <title id="digcomp-structure-title">DigComp 2.2 structural mapping</title>
  <defs><marker id="dc-arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8.5" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.55"/></marker></defs>
  <g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.55">
    <line x1="230" y1="58" x2="230" y2="100" marker-end="url(#dc-arrow)"/>
    <line x1="230" y1="170" x2="230" y2="212" marker-end="url(#dc-arrow)"/>
    <line x1="230" y1="282" x2="230" y2="324" marker-end="url(#dc-arrow)"/>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Framework">
    <rect x="150" y="20" width="160" height="40" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="230" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Framework</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">digcomp:Framework</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Competence area">
    <rect x="60" y="100" width="340" height="70" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.16)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="230" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Competence area</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">digcomp:CompetenceArea</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:OrganizingUnit</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="161" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.55">(no cybed:Role)</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Competence">
    <rect x="120" y="212" width="220" height="70" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="230" y="247" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Competence</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="237" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">digcomp:Competence</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="256" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:RoleElement</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Proficiency descriptor">
    <rect x="100" y="324" width="260" height="60" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="230" y="359" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Proficiency descriptor</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="349" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">digcomp:ProficiencyDescriptor</text>
    <text class="lt" x="230" y="367" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:RoleElement</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Framework-to-competence-area connection">
    <text class="ep" x="238" y="84" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">contains</text>
    <text class="et" x="238" y="84" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasOrganizingUnit</text>
  </g>
  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Competence-area-to-competence connection">
    <text class="ep" x="238" y="196" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">has element</text>
    <text class="et" x="238" y="196" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasElement</text>
  </g>
  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Competence-to-proficiency-descriptor connection">
    <text class="ep" x="238" y="308" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">has element</text>
    <text class="et" x="238" y="308" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasElement</text>
  </g>
</svg>
  <figcaption>DigComp nests three levels. Areas contain competences, and competences carry proficiency descriptors. Click any box or edge label to flip between plain English and the technical schema name.</figcaption>
</figure>
```

:::

## Counts

| Measure | Value |
|---|---|
| Competence Areas | 5 |
| Strict elements | 21 |
| With-examples elements | 21 |
| Elements per Competence Area | 4.2 |

DigComp 2.2's signature update was a set of per-competence Annex
examples illustrating each competence under emerging technologies,
AI in particular. Those Annex examples are not extracted as
queryable nodes. The strict count reflects only the Competence and
ProficiencyDescriptor enumeration, so element-density figures here
materially understate what the publication actually contains.

## Provenance

::: {.provenance-cards .column-page}

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-archive"/></svg>

**Source**

DigComp 2.2 publication (Vuorikari, Kluzer, and Punie, Joint Research Centre, JRC128415).
:::

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-gear"/></svg>

**Ingestion**

`scripts/010-ingest-digcomp.R` parses the structure into the cybed schema.
:::

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-license"/></svg>

**License**

Subject to European Commission re-use terms. The package does not bundle the source text. Users stage it locally.
:::

:::

## Caveats

- DigComp specifies **general digital competences for citizens, not cybersecurity-specific roles or curricula**. Competence Area 4 (Safety) carries the cybersecurity-relevant content, but the framework's specificity sits at general-digital-competence granularity, not at cybersecurity-workforce granularity. Treat DigComp as the citizen baseline that workforce frameworks like NICE and ECSF build above.
- The 2.2 Annex examples illustrating AI-and-digital-citizenship interactions are **not extracted into RDF triples**. Full DigComp 2.2 coverage requires consulting the publication's annex directly.

## Related

- [ENISA ECSF v1](ecsf-v1.qmd), the EU workforce framework that
  picks up where DigComp's citizen baseline leaves off.
- [Cross-framework density spread](../queries/density-spread.qmd)
- [The vocabulary](../concepts/vocabulary.qmd)
